dataset: Nature 2023 + pacogarciam3 Sorting + Rebrickable CDN + Hex:Lego crops (74K real photos, 434 classes)
augmentation: RandAugment(3,12) + MixUp + CutMix + ColorJitter + GaussianBlur + RandomErasing
notes: Phase 2 fallback. 91.6% cross-domain top-1 on Hex:Lego crops (up from Phase 1 10.1%). Deployed behind Brickognize primary.
